summary: All 11 spec ACs (R1:5, R2:2, R3:2, R4:2) appear in the plan's ## Provenance table, each mapped to exactly one bead + at least one concrete named test; no AC is missing or double-mapped across beads. (1) Enumeration: R1 AC1 file-path-divergence-resolves→4ft2·TestValidateDivergenceFilePathImpactedDomainResolves; R1 AC2 cross-gate→4ft2·TestPlanCoverageFilePathImpactedResolves+TestCheckADRCitationsFilePathImpactedResolves; R1 AC3 named-unchanged+blast-radius→4ft2·TestValidateDivergenceNamedDomainUnchanged+existing TestCompleteRejectsUndeclaredDomainTouch; R1 AC4 genuinely-unowned→4ft2·TestValidateDivergenceGenuinelyUnownedStillFails+existing TestUnownedFileRejected; R1 AC5 0/>1-owner→4ft2·TestNormalizeImpactedDomains{Zero,Ambiguous}OwnerErrors+TestNormalizeZeroAndAmbiguousAtPlanGate; R2 AC1→4ft2·TestPlanCoverageHintMentionsExistingADR; R2 AC2→4ft2·TestPlanCoverageHintCreateWhenNoCitation; R3 AC1→3cfr·TestAdrShowWorktree*; R3 AC2→3cfr·TestParseADR_NonListDomainLine; R4 AC1→gpoq·TestScaffoldPlanEmitsADRCitations; R4 AC2→gpoq·TestValidatePlanCitationsWarnNamesKey. (2) RED tests are concrete func names landing in the correct, existing packages (internal/validate, internal/adr, cmd/mindspec); none pre-exists (confirmed by grep) so they are genuinely new RED. Spot-checks vs source verified: divergence.go L142 candidateDomains/meta.Domains, plan.go L124 loadImpactedDomains feeding both gates, L529 adr-coverage-missing 'mindspec adr create' message (R2 target), L141 adr-citations WARN (R4 target), L482 adr-cite-irrelevant; scaffoldPlan approve/spec.go L228 emits spec_id/version with NO adr_citations (R4 gap real); adrListCmd L97 + adrShowCmd L138 use FindRoot while adr create uses FindLocalRoot L32 (R3 target real); parse.go L74 already accepts both Domain(s) forms (R3 lock, parser unchanged). (3) Cross-gate consistency AC-b is pinned by TWO distinct tests exercising checkADRCoverage AND checkADRCitations on the same file-path fixture consuming the normalized set — the panel's key R1 fix is concretely pinned. (4) Blast-radius guard is explicit: R1 AC3 row names existing TestCompleteRejectsUndeclaredDomainTouch (divergence_test.go L97, confirmed) and the Bead 1 RED list + Verification -run filter both re-assert it stays GREEN. (5) No spec requirement is unbeaded and no bead does unrequested work — R1+R2 fused into 4ft2 (shared checkADRCoverage function), R3→3cfr, R4→gpoq; the ADR-0032 amendment + 'add workflow to Domain(s)' doc edit is requirement-driven (R1 design decision), and the build+tests-green row (L320) is mapped to all beads. Helper fixtures the tests reuse (writeSpecAndPlan/writeADR/writeManifest/writeTestSpec/writeTestADRWithDomains/makePlanWithCitations/setupWorktreePair) all exist.
